title: Let's Eat Together, Aki and Haru 2
original_title: アキはハルとごはんを食べたい 2杯目！
overview: As graduation nears, Aki and Haru face jobs in different cities—until Aki realizes his feelings run deeper than friendship in this next chapter of their story.
